category_sources: source_facts.description says it backs up Gmail or other IMAP accounts to disk; official repository describes backup and migration for IMAP email accounts.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub repository identify the project as imap-backup.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface for imap-backup.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has an official repository URL, so repo discovery was skipped per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official repository describe IMAP account backup and migration.
